data.body: PROGRESS — slice 1/4 done (config-loop, commit 2f8faa9d). ticket_clarity.threshold now routes through the typed Config: new typed ticket_clarity section (threshold:int=5, min 1) + read_config_file() helper for the explicit --config-file case; gates._clarity_threshold reads load_config(root)/read_config_file(file) instead of the bespoke _read_config_key (removed); legacy flat .rebar/config.conf ticket_clarity.threshold reads with NO alias (section name matches). This closes the last live .rebar/config.conf read that bypassed load_config — satisfying the epic "route ALL config-file reads through Config" AC. 10 tests; full suite green (1995); subagent review clean. REMAINING (this ticket, next iterations): (2) reconciler.* — route acli_subprocess/_advisory_lock/outbound_differ/rebar_id_audit to load_config().reconciler.* as the config-FILE layer (resolve the nice-env-name vs section-key mismatch: REBAR_JIRA_CLI_TIMEOUT etc. become non-deprecated canonical aliases; preserve the id-guard value-flip + fail-closed + the legacy flat rebar_id_guard_mode); (3) jira.* — JIRA_URL/USER/PROJECT consumers fall back to load_config().jira.*; (4) llm.* — config-file support in LLMConfig.from_env (a [tool.rebar.llm] table, env overriding file).
